final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID card design for a fictional company called 字节期动, front and back views.

Style/medium: photorealistic product mockup, corporate ID card design, clean modern aesthetic
Subject: employee ID card showing portrait photo area, name field, ID number, company logo placeholder, front and back views
Composition: flat lay, two cards side by side (front and back), top-down view, slight perspective angle
Scene/backdrop: neutral gray surface, soft shadow beneath cards
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio light from top-left, clean professional mood
Color palette: white card base with subtle blue accent, black text, corporate blue
Materials/textures: matte plastic card surface, subtle rounded corners, slight card thickness visible
Text (verbatim): "字节期动"
Constraints: front must include photo placeholder and name field; back must include barcode/QR area and terms; both sides must match corporate branding
Avoid: 8K stuffer words, watermark, generic template look, overly glossy finish
